images.caption: Figure 1:Overview ofMHPO\mathrm{MHPO}.(a)Performance gain over baseline (Avg@32, %) on Qwen3-4B-Base. The bar chart displays the improvement (Œî\Delta) achieved by different RL methods across five benchmarks.MHPO\mathrm{MHPO}(navy) consistently achieves the largest gain on every benchmark.(b)Gradient norm trajectory during RL training. Baseline methods exhibit frequent gradient spikes, whereasMHPO\mathrm{MHPO}maintains consistently low and stable gradient magnitudes throughout training, empirically confirming the bounded gradient multiplier guaranteed by our theoretical analysis.(c)Overall reward curve during training.MHPO\mathrm{MHPO}attains higher reward earlier and sustains this advantage, while competing methods plateau or exhibit degradation in later stages.
